name: Mandy Ho
bio: Mandy is a senior at USM majoring in Computer Science. She joined the AIIR lab in the Spring of 2025, conducting research on query disambiguation in mathematical search. This fall, she is exploring brain activity during information-seeking behaviors using EEG devices, focusing on reviewing existing tools and datasets while developing pipelines for reading and processing EEG signals.

name: Clayton Durepos
bio: Clayton is a junior at USM majoring in Computer Science. He joined the AIIR lab in the Spring of 2025, conducting research on sentiment classification in the domain of fine arts. Since then, he has served as a full-stack developer for MathMex, and is now coordinating the research efforts of the lab.

name: Nathaniel Serrano
bio: Nathaniel is a senior at USM majoring in Computer Science. He joined the AIIR lab in the Fall of 2025, conducting research on formula search/retrieval as well as graph-based neural networks for formula matching, while reviewing existing tools and datasets.

name: Aubin Mugisha
bio: Aubin is a senior at USM majoring in Computer Science. He joined the AIIR Lab in the summer of 2025, conducting research on math text and formula simplification. His current work focuses on developing models that detect complex mathematical texts and simplify them into clear, accessible expressions for non-experts.

name: Ella Hawkins
bio: Ella is a sophomore at USM majoring in Computer Science. She joined the AIIR lab in the Fall of 2025, conducting research on query suggestion for mathematical search.

name: Lucas Matheson
bio: Lucas is a senior at USM majoring in Computer Science. He joined the AIIR lab in the Fall of 2025, conducting research on math text and formula searching. His current work is focused on developing fusion models to combine text and formula information for improved search results.

name: Owen Leitzell
bio: Owen is a senior at USM majoring in Computer Science. He joined the AIIR lab in the Fall of 2025, conducting research on audio search methods. Currently he is working to combine the existing models into a single audio to spoken math pipeline.

name: Ellis Fitzgerald
bio: Ellis is a senior at USM majoring in Computer Science. He joined the AIIR lab in the Spring of 2026, conducting research on law document retrieval, and backend development work for MathMex's chatbot integration.

name: Courtney Jackson
bio: Courtney is a senior at USM majoring in Computer Science. She joined the AIIR lab in the Spring of 2026, conducting research on brain activity during information-seeking behaviors using EEG devices
